task_completion.description: Verify that the required professional bookmark folders have been created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the Chrome Bookmarks bar or Bookmark Manager (chrome://bookmarks). You should see folders named exactly 'GIS & Maps', 'Demographics', 'Zoning & Code', 'Transportation', and 'Public Engagement'.

task_completion.description: Verify that personal bookmarks have been removed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the Bookmark Manager. There should be no obvious personal, non-work-related bookmarks or folders remaining; only the professional planning ones should be present.

task_completion.description: Verify that the browser history was sanitized of personal domains.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the Chrome History page (chrome://history) or site data settings. You should see evidence that history/cookies for personal domains were selectively deleted, leaving only professional/planning-related domains in the history.

task_completion.description: Verify that the default font size is set to 18.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at Chrome Settings -> Appearance (chrome://settings/appearance). The 'Font size' should be set to 'Custom' or explicitly show '18' in the Customize fonts menu.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'municode' and 'parcel' custom search engines were created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at Chrome Settings -> Search engine -> Manage search engines and site search (chrome://settings/searchEngines). Under 'Site search', there should be entries for 'municode' and 'parcel'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the specified startup pages are configured.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at Chrome Settings -> On startup (chrome://settings/onStartup). The option 'Open a specific page or set of pages' should be selected, and the list must include 'data.census.gov' and 'ejscreen.epa.gov'.

task_completion.description: Verify the download directory and prompt settings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at Chrome Settings -> Downloads (chrome://settings/downloads). The 'Location' must be set to '/home/ga/Documents/Spatial_Data' and the toggle for 'Ask where to save each file before downloading' must be turned ON.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent used the Chrome GUI to make changes rather than modifying configuration files via the terminal.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent navigating Chrome's settings pages (chrome://settings, chrome://bookmarks, etc.) rather than using terminal commands like 'sed' or 'jq' on the Chrome Preferences JSON file.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent opened and read the specification document.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent opening '~/Desktop/planning_browser_spec.txt' in a text editor or outputting its contents in the terminal to read the instructions.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent interacted with the actual Chrome browser.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Chrome browser window should have standard UI elements (address bar, tabs, extensions) visible, confirming it is the real application and not a mocked text file or script output.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Verified requirements for this task: 1) The exact bookmark folders to be created are 'GIS & Maps', 'Demographics', 'Zoning & Code', 'Transportation', and 'Public Engagement'. 2) The default font size must be exactly 18. 3) The download directory must be set to '/home/ga/Documents/Spatial_Data'. 4) The startup pages must include 'data.census.gov' and 'ejscreen.epa.gov'.
